title: alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. subcordatum
intro: Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. subcordatum, also known as American water plantain, is a subspecies of aquatic plant that belongs to the Alismataceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. subcordatum include its ability to alleviate edema, hypertension, and urinary tract issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for these conditions. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support kidney health and promote overall well-being.
